items.source_title: Highlights from my conversation about agentic engineering on Lenny’s Podcast
items.assessment: 这是 Simon 本人对播客内容的整理，一手确认了他关于 2025 年 11 月 inflection point 的判断。

items.source_title: Highlights from my conversation about agentic engineering on Lenny’s Podcast
items.assessment: Simon 在自己的总结中明确写出 bottleneck has moved to testing，并解释了为什么先做多个 prototype 再验证成为新常态。

items.source_title: Highlights from my conversation about agentic engineering on Lenny’s Podcast
items.assessment: 同一篇一手总结里同时出现了 'my ability to estimate software is broken' 和 'the people in the middle' 的判断。
